links.source_location: slab bears directly on decking sheet
wet concrete self-weight plus construction live load originates at the slab and is the driving action for every layer below
callout 1 arrow points at slab edge
slab thickness is the sole load input; the other three callouts are the resistances tuned against it
decking spans onto and is supported by secondary beams
secondary beams sit crosswise on top of primary beams
callout 2 dimension spans adjacent secondary beams
no geometric link in the drawing, but both are the same design move at different scales: choose a support pitch so the member above stays within bending and deflection limits
the diagram numbers exactly the four quantities a designer varies; each spacing is the span of the layer above it
two-way beam hierarchy exists so a distributed area load is collected into lines then into point reactions at discrete props
primary beam soffit seats in prop head
callout 3 dimension spans adjacent primary beams
head is the top fitting of the prop
callout 4 dimension spans adjacent prop shafts
